labels.uploadSourceAction: or drag and drop it here

tooltips.xmlScheduleFile: Upload the generated schedule as CSV or XLSX. The file may contain any supported subset of month columns.
tooltips.startPostId: The first generated XML item uses this WordPress Post ID.

messages.xmlConverterIdRequired: The XML converter record ID is required.
messages.xmlConverterNotFound: The XML converter record was not found.
messages.xmlSourceRequired: Upload a schedule file before generating XML.
messages.xmlSourceNotFound: The uploaded schedule file was not found.
messages.xmlStartPostIdInvalid: The first WordPress Post ID must be between 1 and 2147483647.
messages.xmlSourceTooLarge: The source file may be at most 20 MiB.
messages.xmlSourceTypeInvalid: The source file must be CSV or XLSX.
messages.xmlCsvUtf8Required: The CSV file must use UTF-8.
messages.xmlCsvUnreadable: The CSV file could not be read.
messages.xmlXlsxStructureInvalid: The XLSX file does not have a valid structure.
messages.xmlXlsxUnreadable: The XLSX file could not be read.
messages.xmlTooManyColumns: The input file may contain at most 50 columns.
messages.xmlNoSupportedMonths: No supported date columns were found. Use Romanian or English month columns, or Luna 1 through Luna 12.
messages.xmlTooManyCourses: The input file may contain at most 5000 courses.
messages.xmlNoValidCourseData: No valid course data was found in the input file.
messages.xmlConversionUnable: Unable to read the uploaded schedule or create XML.
